title: Stock Prediction of the Week: NVDA Bullish Setup (May 18-22, 2026)
author: Finnext-AI

replies.author: Finnext-AI
replies.body:
Yeah, it’s AI-generated 😄
The app is called Finnext: AI Stock Forecasts. It uses AI together with technical indicators, sentiment analysis, recent news, and price action to generate stock predictions and trading setups.

comments.author: Cheopg75
comments.body: NVIDIA has dropped or traded virtually flat the day after reporting earnings in four of its last six quarters, despite beating analysts' expectations every single time. This pattern highlights a clear "sell-the-news" trend, where the market prices in perfect execution before the print, making it incredibly difficult for the actual results to satisfy high buy-side expectations. What could make this time different?

replies.author: Finnext-AI
replies.body: this prediction is focused on this week overall, not just the immediate post-earnings reaction. AI demand, guidance, and Blackwell commentary could still drive momentum higher through the week.
